---
title: "Publications"
page-layout: article
toc: true
---

::: {.rg-hero-eyebrow}
Scholarly work
:::

# Publications

Formal papers, technical reports, workshop submissions, and extended project write-ups.

---

::: {.rg-section}
::: {.rg-section-label}
Manuscripts in preparation
:::
:::

::: {.rg-pub-entry}
<p class="rg-pub-authors">Rishav Ganguly</p>
<p class="rg-pub-title">Long-Horizon Manipulation with Action Chunking Policies and Motion Refinement</p>
<p class="rg-pub-venue">In preparation · 2026</p>
::: {.rg-pub-links}
<a class="rg-pub-link" href="#">Draft (soon)</a>
<a class="rg-pub-link" href="projects.qmd">Project page</a>
:::
:::

::: {.rg-pub-entry}
<p class="rg-pub-authors">Rishav Ganguly</p>
<p class="rg-pub-title">Recurrent PPO for Partially Observable Box Pushing: Memory, Belief, and Curriculum</p>
<p class="rg-pub-venue">In preparation · 2026</p>
::: {.rg-pub-links}
<a class="rg-pub-link" href="#">Draft (soon)</a>
<a class="rg-pub-link" href="projects.qmd">Project page</a>
:::
:::

---

::: {.rg-section}
::: {.rg-section-label}
Working notes
:::
:::

Until formal papers are posted, detailed research progress, experiment logs, and implementation notes are documented on the [blog](blog.qmd) and [project pages](projects.qmd). Pre-prints will be posted to arXiv as they are ready.
